name: GPT-5.4 mini
tagline: Strongest mini yet; 400K context, ~2x faster than GPT-5 mini, $0.
metaDescription: GPT-5.4 mini (OpenAI), released 2026-03-17 — part of the GPT Mini line. Strongest mini yet; 400K context, ~2x faster than GPT-5 mini, $0.75/$4.50 per 1M.
overview: GPT-5.4 mini is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Mini line. Released 2026-03-17. OpenAI's compact, lower-cost line for high-volume coding, tool use, and subagents.
What's notable in this version: Strongest mini yet; 400K context, ~2x faster than GPT-5 mini, $0.75/$4.50 per 1M.
